notes: Нет tracked runtime изменений (git diff empty).
Есть локальные untracked pipeline JSON артефакты (Batch #2).

pre_deploy_restrictions: Do not run URL-based checks (lighthouse/link-check) pre-deploy

nonblocking_gaps: PDP_SAMPLE_TBD reduces reproducibility outside e2e auto-discovery
No explicit automated axe-smoke wired yet (recommended)
Footer coverage not explicitly gated beyond sticky CTA risk

what_can_be_accepted_now.claim: Batch #2 analysis gate completed (Orchestrator + Analyzer + Critic Phase 1) and is allowed to proceed to Doer.
why: Artifacts exist and are internally consistent for a plan/analysis stage.
Critic Phase 1 explicitly sets ok_to_proceed=true with no blocking gaps.
limits: This acceptance is only for the analysis milestone, not for any runtime quality or UX fix.

what_can_be_accepted_now.claim: No runtime verification is required at this step because there are no tracked runtime changes.
why: Without tracked diffs, verify:changed SKIP is expected and does not prove runtime behavior.
L0 ran but does not provide meaningful signal about runtime behavior when nothing changed.

what_cannot_be_accepted_now.claim: Any statement that UX issues are fixed (promo/header/PLP container/spacing/PDP sticky CTA).
why: Doer has not run; there are no code changes to implement fixes.

what_cannot_be_accepted_now.claim: Any statement that Woo critical flow is validated (add_to_cart, cart_update, checkout_entry).
why: L1 Playwright is post-deploy and has not been executed for Batch #2.
No runtime changes exist; therefore no new validation evidence exists for this batch.

what_cannot_be_accepted_now.claim: Any post-deploy quality gates (lighthouse/link-check/L2 visuals/a11y smoke) are satisfied.
why: They are explicitly blocked pre-deploy by orchestrator constraints and were skipped.

notes: Гейт на этом шаге — это целостность план/анализ артефактов + Critic P1 ok_to_proceed, а не runtime verify.
Переход к Doer разрешён, но завершать batch как 'fixed/verified' нельзя до Doer + post-deploy Verify (минимум L1) + Verifier + Critic P2.

minimum_evidence_needed: Tracked code diff implementing selected fixes (within allowed zone only).
Post-deploy Verify L1 Woo flow passing (add_to_cart, cart_update, checkout_entry).
Verifier report that ties claims to diffs + artifacts + test outputs.
Critic+Scorer Phase 2 on updated diff with outcome ACCEPT (score >= threshold).
recommended: Post-deploy visual snapshots on iPhone XR 414x896 for home promo/header, /sklep/, category PLP, PDP bottom with sticky CTA.
Post-deploy a11y smoke (axe) at least for checkout and PDP on 414x896.

honesty_notes: ACCEPT here does not mean any UX issue is fixed; it only means the pipeline is correctly positioned to proceed (ok_to_proceed=true) with no runtime changes in repo.
